subject: chore(docs): remove HISTORY.md/HISTORY_ARCHIVE.md, use git log as changelog
body:
The git log is already the canonical changelog — every commit carries its
rationale via the body + metadata footers (see docs/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md).
A separate HISTORY.md duplicated the same information in prose form,
required AI-assistant ceremony to keep in sync, and drifted (as seen by
the cleanupOutdatedCaches rationale correction one commit ago, which
needed an edit in place to unwind the overstatement — a problem git
amend/revert doesn't have).

Deletions:
- docs/HISTORY.md
- docs/HISTORY_ARCHIVE.md

Reference updates:
- CLAUDE.md: dropped HISTORY.md / HISTORY_ARCHIVE.md rows from the docs
  table, removed the "Add entry to HISTORY.md" / "HISTORY.md entry added"
  steps from the After-Task and Before-Commit checklists, added an
  explicit "git log is the changelog" policy line under the table.
- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: 4 references replaced with "git log" pointers.
- docs/TODO.md: footer pointer updated.
- docs/AI_MISTAKES.md: 3 narrative references trimmed.
- docs/DAISYUI_V5_NOTES.md: related-docs pointer switched to
  `git log --grep='daisyui'`.
- docs/CODE_REVIEW.md: documentation list updated with changelog note.
- scripts/__tests__/daisyui-surfaces.test.mjs: header comment pointer.
- vite.config.js: removed self-referential "see HISTORY.md strengthening
  entry" note in the cleanupOutdatedCaches comment.

Data files under dashboard/public/repos/, dashboard/repos/, and
dashboard/public/data-commits/ intentionally keep HISTORY.md references
— those are historical commit records (the file existed at those
commits) and editing them would corrupt the analytics data.

Tests still 74/74.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, refactor
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: doc-hygiene
Semver: patch
title: remove HISTORY.md/HISTORY_ARCHIVE.md, use git log as changelog
